task_description: Implement a Step Functions state machine skeleton triggered by the EventBridge rule, with a minimal Amazon Polly integration as a Task state. Follow strict TDD, update ARCHITECTURE.md with Mermaid diagram.

verification.summary: All 10 tests pass (5 existing + 5 new). CDK synth succeeds. Tests verify: state machine exists, has logging, definition contains polly/synthesizeSpeech, EventBridge targets it, and IAM policy grants polly:synthesizeSpeech. Semantic review v2 APPROVED.
